title: El‑Rufai’s Family Demands His Release from ICPC Custody
synopsis: The family of former Kaduna governor Nasir El‑Rufai has called for his immediate release, alleging unlawful detention by the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC).
details: The family says the former governor has been held beyond the legal period without formal charges, calling the detention unlawful and without legal basis. They appealed for his unconditional release and respect for due process amidst ongoing investigations. El‑Rufai had been invited and detained on allegations involving interception of communications and related offenses. 0
author: Editor: Radiant Waves Pulse

title: Court Adjourns El‑Rufai’s Arraignment to April 23
synopsis: A Federal High Court in Abuja adjourned former Kaduna governor Nasir El‑Rufai’s arraignment, citing procedural issues.
details: The arraignment was postponed to April 23, 2026, after El‑Rufai was not produced in court. The prosecution confirmed charges involving interception of communications against him, but bail matters could not be addressed due to the adjournment. 1
author: Editor: Radiant Waves Pulse

title: Peter Obi Insists On His Right to Travel Across Nigeria
synopsis: Former presidential candidate Peter Obi says threats will not stop him from visiting any part of Nigeria.
details: Speaking during a visit to Anambra State, Obi affirmed that as a constitutional right, he will continue to travel freely across the nation. He emphasized his commitment to contesting the 2027 presidential election, stating that Nigeria’s current system advantages the privileged and undermines democratic competition. 2
author: Editor: Radiant Waves Pulse

title: Police Recruitment Figures Show Massive Turnout
synopsis: Police Service Commission announces that over 600,000 Nigerians applied for police recruitment.
details: The Police Service Commission stated that 616,873 applications were received nationwide as part of the ongoing recruitment into the Nigeria Police Force. Adamawa State reported the highest number of applicants, highlighting strong interest in police careers. 3
author: Editor: Radiant Waves Pulse

title: Political Tension in Edo After Attack During ADC Event
synopsis: Peter Obi says lawlessness is 'not new' after an attack in Benin City disrupted a political event.
details: At a formal declaration event for an ADC leader in Edo State, Obi described an attempted attack on his convoy, which he survived without injury. The incident has sparked debate about political tensions and security issues ahead of the 2027 elections. 4
author: Editor: Radiant Waves Pulse

title: Prophecy on 2027 Presidential Ticket Could Shake Tinubu’s Plans
synopsis: Prophet Ayodele predicts that a Goodluck Jonathan–Rabiu Kwankwaso ticket could disrupt President Tinubu’s 2027 campaign.
details: Religious leader Primate Babatunde Ayodele suggested that an unexpected coalition featuring former president Goodluck Jonathan and politician Rabiu Kwankwaso might unsettle the political landscape and challenge President Bola Tinubu’s re‑election prospects. 5
author: Editor: Radiant Waves Pulse

title: Discussions Continue on Opposition Strategy for 2027 Elections
synopsis: Analysts and party figures debate opposition coalitions and strategy ahead of the 2027 general election.
details: Political commentary highlights debates within opposition groups about forming strong coalitions to challenge the ruling APC. This includes discussions on leadership figures like Peter Obi and potential alliances with other opposition parties. 6
author: Editor: Radiant Waves Pulse
